microsoft_ft: Architected and scaled Azure's end-to-end resilience validation platform from a **2-person operation** into a self-service system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across strategic customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 delivery of an internal Resilience Automation Platform—defining PRDs, designing self-service scheduling workflows, and overseeing pilot-to-rollout execution—**reducing operational toil by 30%** and enabling scalable, repeatable deployments.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, delivering a full drill program in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate by embedding with engineering and C-level stakeholders to translate complex requirements into production-grade solutions.

Directed 14 high-visibility cross-org recovery executions, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, advising executives and aligning technical teams under strict delivery timelines.

Accelerated AI transformation of planning workflows by building an internal **LLM-powered AI agent**, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% through intelligent automation of mission-critical operations.
microsoft_2023: Drove AI adoption across Azure engineering by championing **AI-driven code generation** workflows—running executive-facing demos and hands-on training that embedded the toolchain across 14 strategic teams, saving **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Shaped product roadmap by conducting 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams to surface critical workflow gaps, translating customer pain into a PRD that secured prioritization of **intent-based YAML generation** for the next release cycle.

Accelerated LLM-powered knowledge retrieval by migrating documentation to a **semantic search platform** and enforcing metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving AI system accuracy for downstream engineering consumers.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch timelines by 28% by architecting a unified automation prioritization framework and securing cross-functional alignment across 140+ teams on a shared deployment roadmap.

Embedded with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, translating findings into a strategic automation roadmap that targeted the highest-impact workflows and defined a scalable path to full deployment.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership real-time visibility into automation gaps and enabling data-driven prioritization of mission-critical engineering investments.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by owning end-to-end delivery of a legacy OS migration strategy—mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and guiding cross-functional teams from architecture through full rollout.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable, repeatable release model for production environments.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and backlog prioritization to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and keeping a complex, multi-team delivery on schedule under tight operational constraints.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by architecting a CRM-based end-to-end workflow for 200+ monthly proposals—standardizing scoping, invoicing, and lifecycle management to eliminate process gaps and accelerate customer conversion.

Cut Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to align messaging with customer pain points and drive qualified pipeline.

Identified and closed margin leaks by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, delivering data-driven pricing recommendations that directly improved leadership's strategic planning and resource allocation models.
